name: resto-manager
description: Application de gestion de restaurant (commandes par QR code, caisse, cuisine, administration)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "API,WEB" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
